'''''Cerebus''''' was a [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] belonging to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. It was under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Monfre]] and had [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from [[Avenger Squadron|Avenger squadron]] carried aboard.

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Cerebus'' is based on [[Wikipedia:Cerberus|Cerberus]], the three-headed dog who guarded the underworld in Greek mythology, however is misspelled.<ref name="SW Blog">{{SW|url=news/drawing-from-the-imagination-mythological-creatures-in-star-wars-part-1|text=Drawing from the Imagination: Mythological Creatures in ''Star Wars'', Part 1|int=Back from the Drawing Board|nolive=1}}</ref>

The ship only appears in a single mission when the [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'']] is attacking [[Dunari's Rest|Dunari's Casino]]. Should the player reduce the ''Corruptor''{{'s}} shields and inflict hull damage, ''Cerebus'' appears.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
